statement: In every magma, Equation 745 (`x = y * (z * ((x * y) * y))`) implies Equation 1284 (`x = y * (((x * x) * z) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0322
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op x y) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x x) z) w))
